codeReview.summary: Commit 811d800 prunes two clearly low-value backend runtime-event tests and adds a prune-mapping artifact with explicit low-value rationale, confidence-critical replacement mapping to stronger parity tests, and skip-debt delta evidence showing non-expansion.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for feature test-reset-prune-clearly-low-value-tests.
